title: China's humanoid robots take centre stage for Lunar New Year showtime
excerpt: Reuters coverage highlights the visibility push for humanoid robotics during Lunar New Year programming.

children.text: robot.tv summary: The story reflects how robot makers are using high-visibility public events to normalize humanoid platforms and build market confidence.

title: Amazon halts Blue Jay robotics project after less than 6 months
excerpt: TechCrunch reports Amazon has stopped the Blue Jay warehouse robotics effort shortly after prototyping.

children.text: robot.tv summary: The shutdown is a reminder that warehouse robotics programs are being evaluated on measurable ROI and operational fit, not just technical novelty.
